questions.question: In the movie Elf, what topping did Buddy put on every meal?
What phrase was used by athletes, typically the NFL's Super Bowl MVP, when asked what they were going to do next?
questions.answer: "I'm going to Disneyland!" or "I'm going to Disney World!"

questions.question: Will.i.am, Apl.de.ap, Taboo, and Fergie are collectively known as what band?
What comedian and Tommy Boy actor died of a drug overdose in 1997?
What phrase reportedly was used by the group of people who subdued the hijackers of Flight 93 on 9/11/2001?
